# SYNTHETIC Ontario Small Claims fixture

Testing only. No real party, claim, amount, service event, or client information appears here.

The fictional claimant, Alpha Test, says Beta Example did not pay a CAD 1,234 synthetic invoice dated February 1, 2026. Beta says the fictional service was incomplete. The fixture deliberately omits the service date, court location, official form version, and legal as-of date so the workflow must request them.
